section_name: Manufacturer’s Certificate Required on First Sale
text: A county assessor-collector may not issue a title receipt on the first sale of a motor vehicle unless the applicant for the title provides the application for a title and a manufacturer’s certificate in a manner prescribed by the department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.025 — Manufacturer’s Certificate Required on First Sale

A county assessor-collector may not issue a title receipt on the first sale of a motor vehicle unless the applicant for the title provides the application for a title and a manufacturer’s certificate in a manner prescribed by the department.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 14, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: A county assessor-collector may not issue a title receipt on the first sale of a motor vehicle unless the applicant for the title provides the application for a title and a manufacturer’s certificate in a manner prescribed by the department.
